title: mayepea zeylanica
intro: Mayepea zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon oak, is a medicinal plant native to Sri Lanka. It is traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mayepea zeylanica include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Mayepea zeylanica is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments to apply topically.
